code:
import io
import string
import list

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(n)
  n
when None
  0
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line1)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line1, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        if v > t
          nums = list.push(nums, v)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(token)
  match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(v)
    if v > t
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut out = ""
mut j = 0
let m = nums.len()
while j < m
  let v = match nums.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if j == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  j = j + 1
end
println(out)
